title: entada scandens
intro: Entada scandens, also known as the horsefly tree or cow itch tree, is a tropical plant native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Entada scandens include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Entada scandens can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health issues.
